# ScheduleOSUpdateCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to schedule an update of the operating system on a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object ScheduleOSUpdateCommand
```

## Objects

- **ScheduleOSUpdateCommand.Command**: The command to schedule an update of the operating system on a device.

## Commands and responses

- **ScheduleOSUpdateResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to schedule an update of the operating system on a device.
